elements.title: lang::report_page_022_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_u.id,
       kbi_u.lastaccess,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.email,
       grd.grade,
       sls.roles,
       kbi_u.timecreated,
       grd.courses,
       kbi_lit.timespend AS timespend,
       kbi_lit.visits    AS visits
FROM mdl_user kbi_u
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_ra.userid,
                         ROUND(AVG(CASE
                                     WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                                     ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0) AS grade,
                         COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ctx.instanceid)         as courses
                  FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                         JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND
                                                    kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                         JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.courseid = kbi_ctx.instanceid AND
                                                         kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course'
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g ON kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id AND
                                                         kbi_g.userid = kbi_ra.userid AND
                                                         kbi_g.finalgrade IS NOT NULL
                         JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_c.id AND
                                              kbi_c.visible = 1
                  WHERE kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course'
                    AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
                  GROUP BY kbi_ra.userid) grd ON grd.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_ra.userid, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT (kbi_r.shortname) SEPARATOR ',') AS roles
                  FROM mdl_context kbi_ctx
                         JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.contextid = kbi_ctx.id
                         JOIN mdl_role kbi_r ON kbi_ra.roleid = kbi_r.id
                  WHERE kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 10
                  GROUP BY kbi_ra.userid) sls ON sls.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_lit.userid, SUM(kbi_lil.timespend) as timespend, SUM(kbi_lil.visits) as visits
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_lit
                         JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_track_log kbi_lil ON kbi_lil.trackid = kbi_lit.id
                  WHERE kbi_lil.id > 0
                  GROUP BY kbi_lit.userid) lit ON kbi_lit.userid = kbi_u.id
WHERE kbi_u.id > 0
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
